stimuli.description: Letter image whose identity matches the letter shown 'delay' trials ago (n-back match trial).

response.response_key_js: (() => { if (typeof window.correctResponse !== 'undefined' && window.correctResponse !== null) return window.correctResponse; if (typeof window.nbackCondition !== 'undefined') { const g = (window.efVars && typeof window.efVars.group_index === 'number') ? window.efVars.group_index : 1; const low = (g >= 0 && g <= 4); const matchKey = low ? '.' : ','; const mismatchKey = low ? ',' : '.'; return window.nbackCondition === 'match' ? matchKey : mismatchKey; } return null; })()

stimuli.description: Letter image whose identity does NOT match the letter shown 'delay' trials ago (n-back mismatch trial). The first 'delay' trials of each block are always mismatch.

response.response_key_js: (() => { if (typeof window.correctResponse !== 'undefined' && window.correctResponse !== null) return window.correctResponse; if (typeof window.nbackCondition !== 'undefined') { const g = (window.efVars && typeof window.efVars.group_index === 'number') ? window.efVars.group_index : 1; const low = (g >= 0 && g <= 4); const matchKey = low ? '.' : ','; const mismatchKey = low ? ',' : '.'; return window.nbackCondition === 'match' ? matchKey : mismatchKey; } return null; })()

counterbalancing.rule: group_index 0-4: match -> period key '.', mismatch -> comma key ','. group_index 5-14: match -> comma key ',', mismatch -> period key '.'. The page also exposes the resolved correct key per trial as window.correctResponse (highest-fidelity source, preferred over recomputation).
counterbalancing.delay_schedule: delay alternates between 1 and 2 across blocks on a shuffled fixed schedule (not adaptive to performance); the first 'delay' trials of each block are always mismatch.

timing.trial_context_js: (() => { try { return 'delay=' + window.delay + '|cond=' + window.nbackCondition + '|stage=' + window.expStage + '|block=' + (window.expStage === 'practice' ? window.practiceCount : window.testCount); } catch (e) { return ''; } })()

attention_check.response_js: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-attention-check-rdoc-stimulus'); if (!el) return null; const t = (el.textContent || '').toLowerCase(); const m = t.match(/press the ([a-z]) key/); if (m) return m[1]; if (t.includes('third to last')) return 'x'; if (t.includes('second to last')) return 'y'; if (t.includes('last letter')) return 'z'; if (t.includes('first letter')) return 'a'; if (t.includes('second letter')) return 'b'; if (t.includes('third letter')) return 'c'; return null; })()
